title: dianthus furcatus subsp. subulatus
intro: Dianthus furcatus subsp. subulatus, also known as the Saw-toothed Pink or Saw-toothed Pink Flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Dianthus furcatus subsp. subulatus include its ability to promote digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and respiratory infections.
